title: High-Throughput Mapping of Single-Neuron Projections by Sequencing of Barcoded RNA
abstract: MAPseq (Multiplexed Analysis of Projections by Sequencing) labels neurons with unique RNA barcodes, enabling high-throughput mapping of single-neuron projections. We demonstrate that individual locus coeruleus neurons have idiosyncratic projection patterns.
notes: Recasts neuroanatomical tracing as a sequencing problem. Foundational method.
